corrections.text: The article states that The Build noted, "the transition eliminates licensing complexity for downstream packagers who previously had to manage compatibility calculations against a proprietary license used nowhere else in the industry." This is a paraphrase, not a verbatim quote. The Build (Christophe Pettus) actually wrote that "downstream packagers have spent two decades doing license-compatibility math against a license that almost nobody else uses" and that PHP "removed an entire category of licensing question from their packagers' lives." The substance is accurate; the wording in quote marks is the article's paraphrase of those passages.
